text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem dhis2-tracked-entity-attributes-cs

This code system https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/dhis2-tracked-entity-attributes-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
hDEhIMZe07x CR - Patient IDCR - Patient ID
nJsmdQXRoze GEN - Family nameFamily name or last name of the person or case.
sB1IHYu2xQT GEN - Given nameGiven name or first name of the person or case.
m7GEZG8cyCO CR - SexCR - Sex
NI0QRzJvQ0k GEN - Date of birthDate of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

name: Dhis2TrackedEntityAttributesCS
title: DHIS2 Tracked Entity Attributes
description: Code system for 5 unique DHIS2 tracked entity attributes

concept.definition: Family name or last name of the person or case.
Given name or first name of the person or case.
Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another attribute that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.
